mapper.select: SELECT CASE WHEN account_type IN ('SAVINGS', 'DEPOSIT') THEN '예금·적금' WHEN account_type = 'PENSION' THEN '연금' WHEN account_type = 'REAL_ESTATE' THEN '부동산' ELSE '기타' END AS category, SUM(balance) AS amount FROM linked_bank_accounts WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND closed_at IS NULL GROUP BY category HAVING amount > 0 ORDER BY amount DESC

SELECT CASE WHEN category IN ('보험', '통신', '월세', '교통', '관리비') THEN 'FIXED' ELSE 'VARIABLE' END AS category, SUM(amount) AS amount FROM card_transactions WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_cancelled = FALSE AND paid_at >= #{from} AND paid_at < #{to} GROUP BY 1
